subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Grieve not over what hath befallen My Beauty at the hands of the oppressors among My creation and the rebellious ones among My creatures. By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی لاتحزنی عما ورد علی جمالی من طغاه خلقی و عصاه بریتی تالله
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
